subcodes.first_line: O my God! How can I make mention of Thee, speak forth Thy praise, and give voice to Thy attributes and glorification, when my remembrance and praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی کیف اذکرک و انطق بثنائک و اتفوه بنعوتک و محامدک و لم یکن ذکری و ثناای
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
